stories.description: Independent Sales-Demo Seed Pipeline â€” new server/scripts/seed-sales-demo.ts (zero edits to seed-demo.ts), reset-sales-demo.ts with explicit company_id-scoped DELETE list for non-cascading accounting/IFTA tables (verified against migration 038 column rename), GL-6900 + GL-2200 IFTA accounts, Fleet Core tier pinned, single .env.local contract

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: seedSalesDemo issues UPDATE companies SET subscription_tier='Fleet Core' for SALES-DEMO-001 (assert by SQL capture)
seedSalesDemo throws Error('SALES_DEMO_ADMIN_FIREBASE_UID required') when env var unset
resetSalesDemo throws when DB_NAME='production-loadpilot' (prod-name guard)
seedSalesDemo inserts gl_accounts rows with ids GL-6900 AND GL-2200 (the IFTA pair) before any IFTA evidence insert
Tier audit walks â‰¥15 requireTier('Fleet Core'|'Automation Pro') routes and asserts statusCode !== 403 for the seeded admin

docs/sales-demo-seed-contract.md contains 5 required H2 sections: ## Rows present after reset, ## Firebase UID env contract, ## GL accounts that must exist, ## Hidden routes & rationale, ## Known SaaS follow-ups
100% of seedSalesDemo insert statements use INSERT IGNORE (idempotent â€” second invocation produces 0 new rows)
seedSalesDemo does NOT import or require server/scripts/seed-demo.ts (independent pipeline guarantee â€” assert via grep on the source)

resetSalesDemo issues DELETE statements against ALL 10 non-cascading tables (ifta_trips_audit, ifta_trip_evidence, mileage_jurisdiction, fuel_ledger, journal_lines, journal_entries, ar_invoices, ap_bills, gl_accounts, documents) BEFORE the DELETE FROM companies. The 8 accounting/IFTA tables filter on company_id (verified against migration 038); journal_lines filters via journal_entry_id subquery; documents filters on company_id. Assert via SQL capture: every table name appears in the captured DELETE list, every WHERE clause uses company_id (NOT tenant_id), and the company DELETE is the LAST one issued.
resetSalesDemo is idempotent â€” second invocation against an already-empty tenant exits 0 without 'row not found' or FK violation errors

.env.example.sales-demo file exists at the repo root and contains placeholder lines for all 7 required keys: DB_HOST, DB_PORT, DB_USER, DB_PASSWORD, DB_NAME, SALES_DEMO_ADMIN_FIREBASE_UID, SALES_DEMO_DRIVER_FIREBASE_UID (assert via grep on the file)

seedSalesDemo source contains exactly one dotenv.config call and that call references '.env.local' (NOT '.env') â€” proves the single env contract for seed/reset/certify. Assert via grep on the source.

stories.description: Pre-Seeded Hero Load + Broker â€” seed customers row + loads row (with customer_id FK) + load_legs + 3 documents linked to LP-DEMO-RC-001. Live LoadDetailView reads everything via unmodified routes. Document UI labels are stubbed today (out of scope).

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: seedSalesDemoLoads inserts exactly 1 row into customers with id 'SALES-DEMO-CUST-001' and type 'Broker' (assert via SQL capture)
seedSalesDemoLoads inserts exactly 1 row into loads with id 'LP-DEMO-RC-001' AND customer_id = 'SALES-DEMO-CUST-001' (assert the FK linkage via SQL capture)
seedSalesDemoLoads inserts exactly 2 rows into load_legs and 3 rows into documents linked to LP-DEMO-RC-001
seedSalesDemoLoads is idempotent â€” second invocation produces 0 new rows (INSERT IGNORE count)
seedSalesDemoLoads does NOT import or call any function from server/routes/ai.ts or server/services/gemini.service.ts (live-functions-only guarantee â€” assert via grep)

GET /api/loads returns the seeded load with loadNumber 'LP-DEMO-RC-001'; GET /api/clients/SALES-DEMO-001 returns the broker with id 'SALES-DEMO-CUST-001' and name 'ACME Logistics LLC'; GET /api/documents?load_id=LP-DEMO-RC-001 returns 3 document rows. All three calls use the unmodified production handlers.

Playwright spec opens LP-DEMO-RC-001 from Load Board, asserts visible DOM contains 'LP-DEMO-RC-001', 'ACME Logistics LLC', 'Frozen Beef', 'Houston', and 'Chicago' within 5 seconds. Clicks Documents button and asserts at least 3 document cards (container selector) are visible. Spec does NOT assert on doc.filename or doc.type text content.

grep server/routes/ai.ts, server/services/gemini.service.ts, components/Scanner.tsx, components/DriverMobileHome.tsx, components/LoadDetailView.tsx, services/brokerService.ts HEAD vs sprint-end shows zero diff (snapshot test on file SHA256 for each file)

stories.description: IFTA Trip-Based Evidence Seed + Real-UI Walkthrough â€” 12 ifta_trip_evidence rows tied to LP-DEMO-RC-001 (load-based, NOT truck-based; equipment row NOT seeded). All accounting/IFTA INSERTs use company_id (verified against migration 038); fuel_ledger uses entry_date column (verified against migration 011 line 114). Live IFTAManager + IFTAEvidenceReview UI walkthrough using text selectors against verified button labels.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: seedSalesDemoIfta returns { evidenceRows: 12, fuelRows: 8, mileageRows: 6 }. The return shape contains NO trucksInserted field (trip-based, not truck-based)

All 12 ifta_trip_evidence INSERT statements have company_id = 'SALES-DEMO-001' AND load_id = 'LP-DEMO-RC-001'. All 8 fuel_ledger INSERTs use the column name 'entry_date' (NOT 'fuel_date' which does not exist) and company_id = 'SALES-DEMO-001'. All 6 mileage_jurisdiction INSERTs use company_id = 'SALES-DEMO-001'. Assert via SQL capture against a mocked mysql connection.
seedSalesDemoIfta source contains ZERO references to the string 'equipment' and ZERO 'INSERT INTO equipment' statements (assert via grep â€” proves trip-based design)
GET /api/accounting/ifta-summary?quarter=4&year=2025 returns rows.length >= 6 && totalMiles >= 20000 && netTaxDue > 0. Uses the live unmodified route handler.

Playwright walkthrough completes the full text-selector sequence (nav-accounting â†’ Fuel & IFTA â†’ Q4 â†’ 2025 â†’ load card â†’ Evidence Timeline visible â†’ Computed Jurisdiction Split visible â†’ attestation checkbox â†’ Lock Trip for Audit â†’ success indicator) within 10 seconds. Spec uses zero data-testid on IFTA elements; grep confirms no 'data-testid="ifta-' substrings in the spec file.
seedSalesDemoIfta is idempotent (second invocation produces 0 new rows)
grep components/IFTAManager.tsx, components/IFTAEvidenceReview.tsx, components/AccountingPortal.tsx HEAD vs sprint-end shows zero diff (live-functions-only guarantee)

stories.description: CRM Registry Depth â€” seed 12 parties (3/2/2/3/2 split) into the 8 verified party_* tables that GET /api/parties enriches. Direct SQL only (POST /api/parties has unrelated bug). NetworkPortal renders 6 tabs with seeded data.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: seedSalesDemoParties inserts exactly 3 customers, 2 brokers, 2 vendors, 3 facilities, 2 contractors (12 parties total) â€” assert by type breakdown via SQL capture
Every party has at least 1 contact, 1 document, 1 rate row, 1 constraint set, 1 catalog link (assert via fixture validation + SQL capture counts)
seedSalesDemoParties does NOT issue any INSERT against broker_credit_scores, customer_rate_sheets, or party_interactions (none of those tables exist â€” assert via grep on the source)
seedSalesDemoParties does NOT call POST /api/parties and does NOT import any function from server/routes/clients.ts (live-functions-only via direct SQL â€” assert via grep)

GET /api/parties returns exactly 12 parties for the sales-demo tenant with the correct type breakdown (3/2/2/3/2) and the first broker has all 5 enrichment arrays (contacts, documents, rates, constraintSets, catalogLinks) non-empty
Playwright walkthrough opens NetworkPortal, drills into a broker, clicks each of the 6 tabs (IDENTITY, CONTACTS, CATALOG, RATES, CONSTRAINTS, DOCS) and asserts content is visible in each
grep components/NetworkPortal.tsx, services/networkService.ts, server/routes/clients.ts HEAD vs sprint-end shows zero diff (live-functions-only guarantee)

stories.description: Demo-Blocker Regression Tests â€” lock down the SafetyView empty-state KPI, GlobalMapViewEnhanced env-var-leak fallback, and document Quotes route disposition. Tests only â€” zero production code edits.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: SafetyView with operators=[] does not render the substring "13" anywhere in the DOM (assert via screen.queryByText('13') returning null)
SafetyView with 5 compliant operators renders "0" and "All Clear" in the Non-Compliant tile
GlobalMapViewEnhanced fallback DOM never contains the substring "VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY"
docs/sales-demo-seed-contract.md contains a ## Quotes route disposition H2 section with non-empty body
grep components/SafetyView.tsx, components/GlobalMapViewEnhanced.tsx HEAD vs sprint-end shows zero diff (live-functions-only guarantee)

stories.description: Demo Shell Allowlist + Reset Endpoint â€” App.tsx nav filter behind VITE_DEMO_NAV_MODE=sales (real route keys: operations-hub, loads, calendar, network, accounting, exceptions). Triple-locked POST /api/demo/reset endpoint. Surgical: <30 lines added to App.tsx, exactly 2 lines added to server/index.ts.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: isDemoNavMode() returns true iff VITE_DEMO_NAV_MODE === 'sales' (verified by unit test asserting both true and false branches)
DEMO_NAV_ALLOWLIST deep-equals exactly the array ['operations-hub','loads','calendar','network','accounting','exceptions'] (toEqual on literal array â€” real App.tsx route keys, no fictional ones)
App.tsx with demo mode off renders Telematics, Company Settings, Issues & Alerts, and Operations Center nav items (production-untouched proof)
App.tsx with demo mode on renders only the 6 allowlisted nav items + Reset Demo button; Telematics and Company Settings are absent
POST /api/demo/reset returns 401 unauthenticated, 403 for non-admin role, 403 for non-SALES-DEMO-001 tenant, 403 when ALLOW_DEMO_RESET env unset (4 separate integration assertions)
POST /api/demo/reset returns 200 with { ok: true } when all 4 gates pass and the inner resetSalesDemo (mocked to return a sentinel) runs

docs/sales-demo-runbook.md contains 6 required H2 sections: ## Two Chrome profiles, ## Setting demo nav mode (.env.local), ## Resetting between demos, ## Recovery from accidental URL, ## Firebase user provisioning prerequisite, ## Live Gemini disclaimer
App.tsx diff vs HEAD is < 30 added lines and 0 removed lines (live-functions-only minimal-touch guarantee â€” assert via git diff --numstat App.tsx)
server/index.ts diff vs HEAD is exactly 2 added lines (the import + the conditional ALLOW_DEMO_RESET mount)

gateCmds.unit: npx vitest run __tests__/services/demoNavConfig.test.ts __tests__/App.demo-nav.test.tsx --reporter=verbose && cd server && npx vitest run __tests__/docs/sales-demo-runbook.test.ts --reporter=verbose

stories.description: Windows-Safe Certification Pipeline â€” single npm script demo:certify:sales runs reset + 4 Playwright specs + appends timestamped pass record to docs/release/evidence.md. .cjs script using os.tmpdir() (no /tmp), .env.local for env vars (no cross-env), Firebase user provisioning documented as prerequisite.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: scripts/demo-certify.cjs appends a ### <timestamp> block under ## Sales Demo Certification with the last 50 lines of input log (verified via temp-dir unit test)
scripts/demo-certify.cjs exits 1 when the input log file is missing
scripts/demo-certify.cjs source contains zero references to /tmp (regex assertion); references os.tmpdir() instead
e2e/sales-demo/00-smoke.spec.ts passes against the seeded sales-demo tenant when FIREBASE_WEB_API_KEY is set; gracefully test.skips with a clear message when not
e2e/sales-demo/README.md exists and lists all 4 specs (00-smoke, 01-document-automation, 02-ifta-walkthrough, 03-network-portal-walkthrough)
package.json demo:certify:sales script value is exactly 'node scripts/demo-certify.cjs' (no Unix env syntax, no cross-env, no &&)
docs/release/evidence.md contains a ## Sales Demo Certification H2 section

gateCmds.unit: npx vitest run __tests__/scripts/demo-certify.test.ts --reporter=verbose && cd server && npx vitest run __tests__/docs/sales-demo-e2e-readme.test.ts __tests__/docs/release-evidence.test.ts --reporter=verbose
